versions.author: UatuAudit Team
versions.changelog: Initial methodology for reentrancy detection covering classic, cross-function, read-only, cross-contract, and delegatecall reentrancy

versions.author: UatuAudit Team
versions.changelog: Initial methodology for oracle manipulation covering flash loan attacks, TWAP manipulation, Chainlink misuse, and read-only reentrancy in oracles

versions.author: UatuAudit Team
versions.changelog: Initial methodology for access control vulnerabilities covering missing modifiers, tx.origin issues, unprotected initializers, RBAC problems, and centralization risks

versions.author: UatuAudit Team
versions.changelog: Initial methodology for injection attacks covering SQL, NoSQL, Command, LDAP, and ORM injection patterns
